items.title: Amasty patches 25 Magento extensions, 1 critical
items.summary: Amasty released a security update for 25 Magento extensions, including at least one critical vulnerability that could lead to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: This vulnerability in Amasty Order Attributes allows unauthenticated attackers to upload arbitrary executable files to a Magento store, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated PHP object injection flaw in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a Magento extension, enables remote code execution via a specially crafted cookie. CISA has listed this as actively exploited.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Sansec discovered this critical flaw in Magento's REST API, allowing unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store by disguising code as an image, bypassing validation.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This Adobe Security Bulletin addresses multiple critical vulnerabilities, including incorrect authorization (CVE-2026-21284), improper access control (CVE-2026-21285), and stored XSS (CVE-2026-21310), which could lead to full system takeover, data leaks, and admin hijacking.
